name: My work injury claim got denied in Murray Utah, what now?
description: Appeal within 20 days to Labor Commission with more evidence.[1]

mainEntity.name: My work injury claim got denied in Murray Utah, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days to Labor Commission with more evidence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal the denial to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of notice, providing new evidence like medical opinions linking injury to job. Many denials overturn on appeal.[1] Key factors: common reasons (late report, not work-related); hearing before ALJ; insurer burden shifts. Gather stronger proof, request mediation; attorney boosts success rate. Deadlines strict—act fast.
